plugins.name: rem2
plugins.description: Unofficial — NOT an official Yonsei University or REM2 lab plugin. Built by a grad student who couldn't bear his juniors' daring figures and wanted to ease the pain, if only a little. Consistent scientific/engineering plot styling for MATLAB (axes, legends, labels, time-series, X–Y, 3-D, frequency-response), journal-submission figure export (IEEE/Elsevier column-width sizing, vector PDF, grayscale-survivable curves), plus concise code-comment style rules — all with runnable examples.
